description.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术UI面板，支持可配置边框、圆角半径、背景填充和可选标题栏。适用于游戏HUD和菜单原型设计。
description.en: Generates pixel art UI panels with configurable border, corner radius, background fill, and optional title bar. Suitable for game HUD and menu mockups.

triggers.zh-Hans: 面板, UI面板, 窗口, 对话框, 游戏界面, HUD面板
triggers.en: panel, UI panel, window, dialog, game UI, HUD panel

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术UI面板，用于游戏HUD窗口和菜单原型。
exampleUsage.en: Generate pixel-art UI panels for game HUD windows and menu mockups.
